parameters-en.Speed: Controls the speed or rate of the tremolo. When set to note values, Speed follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Intensity: Controls the depth of the tremolo, or the intensity of the volume fluctuations (or when Mode is set to "Vibrato,", pitch fluctuations).
parameters-en.Mode: Selects between Tremolo (repeating volume fluctuations) and Vibrato (repeating pitch fluctuations).
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
